name: Demon Aura Nine Sword Style Asura Blades Drawn Dead Man's Game

issues.description: Rest action targets only opponent Characters, but card text allows choosing 'up to a total of 2 of your opponent's Characters or DON!! cards'. Target scope should support both character and don types.
Rest action missing count limit. Card specifies 'up to a total of 2' but action has no quantity constraint.
